prompt: A high-end photorealistic lifestyle shot of a rustic ceramic bowl filled with a steaming, hearty chicken and vegetable stew with grains, placed on a modern dark wood kitchen table. A hand holds a sleek, futuristic smartphone over the bowl, capturing a photo. Subtle cyberpunk aesthetics: a soft teal and lime green neon glow emanates from the table edges and the phone screen, casting faint light on the food. In the background, a blurred high-tech kitchen with vertical greenery and soft blue ambient lighting. Cinematic lighting, 8k resolution, premium food photography style, depth of field.
negative_prompt: text, letters, numbers, words, watermark, logo, QR code, interface buttons, distorted fingers, extra digits, blurry face, messy kitchen, low resolution, cartoon, illustration.
notes: I focused on the 'stew from leftovers' theme by using a rustic bowl to contrast with the high-tech environment.
Integrated the teal/green brand colors through neon table accents and phone glow to match the 'shopping mode' reference.
The phone framing directly visualizes the 'take a photo to get numbers' hook from the post text.
Maintained a premium look by using warm wood textures and cinematic steam to make the 'leftover' meal look appetizing.
